description_long: This is a vintage, open-top automobile reminiscent of early 20th-century vehicles, featuring a black body with gold trim and red accents. The car has large, spoked wooden wheels with red and gold coloring, and a flatbed cargo area at the rear, which includes a spare tire mounted horizontally. The front of the car displays a simple, rounded hood and a single headlamp on the driver's side. The interior consists of a bench seat upholstered in red, a large steering wheel, and several control levers. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and minimal bodywork, typical of early motor vehicles used for both personal and light cargo transport.
description: A vintage black and gold open-top car with red accents, spoked wheels, and a rear flatbed cargo area with a spare tire. Features include a single headlamp, bench seating, and exposed mechanical parts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded hood, single headlamp on the left, and the red bench seat behind the steering wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the spoked wheels, gold trim, open cabin, and the flatbed cargo area with a visible spare tire.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flatbed cargo area, spare tire mounted horizontally, and the open structure of the car's back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the spoked wheels, open cabin, and the rear cargo area.
attribute_headlight_design: single round headlamp on the left side
